params.prompt: Premium cinematic dark SaaS hero background for a Web3 AI payments product. Abstract proof rail flowing across a black graphite canvas, red signal core, cream-white rails, subtle Casper blockchain nodes, AI agent silhouettes as elegant glass cards, payment unlock glow, high-end fintech aesthetic, dramatic lighting, deep negative space, no readable text, no logos, no random letters, no watermark. Brand palette: black #080808, off-white #F6F5F3, signal red #FF2D2D, muted graphite.
